title: EAR agent heartbeat (_health/{agent_id}.json, overwritten per upload run)

disk_pct.description: HOST-level disk usage %, shared across the host's 4 sensors (the one shared uploader writes the same value into all four heartbeats). Scope note per finding REL.1/LEAD.1.

queue_depth.description: PER-DEVICE: files awaiting upload in THIS agent_id's folder (not host-aggregate). Scope note per finding REL.1.

dlq_count.description: PER-DEVICE: poison files in this agent_id's DLQ view. Scope note per finding REL.1.

ntp_offset_ms.description: clock offset vs NTP at heartbeat time; continuous drift visibility (time-sync validation hook)
